overall_summary: Mapping correctly identifies vulnerability scans (7.5, 7.6) as the primary detection mechanisms for configuration deviations in the absence of dedicated config scan controls. Flagged as WARN per QA Change 5 because safeguard scope (vulnerability scanning) exceeds internal control scope (configuration checks), though functionally inclusive. No false negatives identified; process controls (4.1) correctly excluded as prerequisites.

per_mapping_verdicts.judge_note: Safeguard primary action (Vulnerability Scanning) exceeds internal control primary action (Configuration Checks). Flagged WARN per QA Change 5 (Over-inclusion check) for human confirmation on strict applicability, though mapping is defensible as PARTIAL due to functional overlap (authenticated scans include config benchmarks).
